ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and praised in the David Zucker AMA. Consistently recommended as one of the greatest comedies ever made, known for its rapid-fire jokes and iconic status.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned alongside Airplane! in the David Zucker AMA. Celebrated for its slapstick humor and Leslie Nielsen's performance.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended across multiple threads (r/horror, r/MovieSuggestions) as a top-tier comedy horror film, blending genres perfectly.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as the inspiration for the r/horror thread and repeatedly recommended as a classic comedy horror with a unique premise.

ranked_movies.title: Caddyshack
ranked_movies.reason: Ranked as the most iconic sports comedy in the r/Cinema thread and frequently mentioned in 80s comedy lists.

ranked_movies.title: This Is Spinal Tap
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in the mockumentary thread (r/MovieSuggestions) and cited as the quintessential film about a 'talentless' band.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the 80s comedy list and general comedy suggestions. A classic Mel Brooks film known for its satirical humor.

ranked_movies.title: Young Frankenstein
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested in multiple comedy threads (r/horror, r/MovieSuggestions) as a masterpiece of parody and one of Mel Brooks' best.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently paired with Shaun of the Dead in recommendations. Praised for its action-comedy blend and Edgar Wright's style.

ranked_movies.title: Major League
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a top sports comedy in the r/Cinema thread, known for its charismatic characters and humorous take on baseball.

ranked_movies.title: Rush Hour
ranked_movies.reason: Central to the r/okbuddycinephile thread about interracial comedy movies. Celebrated for the chemistry between Jackie Chan and Chris Tucker.

ranked_movies.title: Harold and Kumar Go to White Castle
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted in the interracial comedy thread and noted for its stoner humor and cult status.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in the comedy horror threads for its meta-commentary and clever deconstruction of horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: The Blues Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested in 80s comedy lists and general recommendations. Known for its musical numbers and chaotic energy.

ranked_movies.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
ranked_movies.reason: Implied through references to 'Life of Brian' in the request post. A cornerstone of absurdist comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Ghostbusters
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in 80s comedy lists and comedy horror threads. A classic blend of supernatural and comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Spaceballs
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested in 80s comedy lists. A beloved sci-fi parody from Mel Brooks.

ranked_movies.title: Happy Gilmore
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the sports comedy thread as a favorite, known for Adam Sandler's energetic performance.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Cited by the OP in the r/horror thread and recommended in others. A modern mockumentary classic.

ranked_movies.title: Top Secret!
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed in the David Zucker AMA. A cult classic known for its absurd humor and parody of spy films.
